rows.label: qev025603_MSG0001
rows.name:
Wh-... what is it?! This Ma-non
dragged me outside the shop, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm in the middle of work,
you know. If you have business
with me, make it quick.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0003
rows.name:
*Sniff*... Bobby lost his
life at the Devil's Colony
in the Valley of Oblivion...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0004
rows.name:
If his wristwatch is out
there, it's definitely got
to be around there somewhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0005
rows.name:
But... why would you go that far for
me? Who are you people, anyway?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0006
rows.name:
Uugh... I was trying so hard to hold it back
and focus on work, but you guys saying all these
weird things made me remember everything...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0007
rows.name:
I remember one time, that boy... gave me some hand
cream while I was washing dishes, saying that
working with water all the time must be tough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0008
rows.name:
Plenty of BLADEs come to my shop, but
Bobby was the only one who showed me
that kind of consideration... *Sniff*...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0009
rows.name:
We've gathered sufficient "Sorrow" data, haven't
we. Now, hurry and hand over the wristwatch to
return her brainwaves to a normal value, please.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0010
rows.name:
This is...! It's definitely
Bobby's wristwatch...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0011
rows.name:
Aah, thank you... I gave this to him
as a commemorative gift when he went
to the battlefield for the first time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Somehow, holding it tight
like this, I feel like that
boy is right here near me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0013
rows.name:
Ooh! The value is dropping rapidly! Hmmm... A
wristwatch not only tells time, but it also has
a function to lower "Sorrow," doesn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_JNK0010
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025603_SEL0011
rows.name: Explain the change in Pollen's emotional state to Chiopittas.

rows.label: qev025603_JNK0020
rows.name: Ignore

rows.label: qev025603_SEL0021
rows.name: Leave Chiopittas to his misunderstanding.

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0014
rows.name:
Feelings of com-passion? Mourn-ing
the dead? What sort of specialized
terminology is that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0015
rows.name:
Well, no matter. The data has been collected,
hasn't it. Once I analyze this, I should be
able to fully understand Earthling "Sorrow."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0016
rows.name:
Next time I encounter an Earthling
in a state of "Sorrow," I shall try
giving them a wristwatch myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hehe, I would love to acquire even
more data on "Sorrow," wouldn't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0018
rows.name: ...Ah... Aaaah!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0019
rows.name:
What is the matter?! Her emotions,
which had returned to a normal
value, have suddenly spiked again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0020
rows.name:
...On the back of the watch...
"May Mother Pollen protect
you!" in his handwriting...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0021
rows.name:
What is this all about... Uugh...!
To think of me as a mother... That
boy really is a foolish child.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0022
rows.name:
Hmmm... The brainwaves are oscillating differently
from the "Sorrow" from earlier, aren't they...
"Sorrow" is quite a complex thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Well, no matter. Let's move
on to the next sample. Please
return to our previous location.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'll take good care of this wristwatch.
When that boy eventually returns from the
Central Life, I'll give it back to him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Thank you. Please give my
thanks to that weird Ma-non too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0026
rows.name:
Hey... the Lifepoints are being
destroyed one after another, right?
The Central Life... is safe, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0027
rows.name:
If that disappears, all the customers
happily chatting away in the restaurant
will suddenly just drop dead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025603_MSG0028
rows.name:
So that doesn't happen... Please find
it quickly, I'm counting on you, okay?[ST:wait ]
